name: Feedback Technology Corp.
summary: Feedback Technology Corp. manufactures and sells components for semiconductor, LCD, LED, and vacuum industries in Taiwan. The company offers helium leak detectors, MV multi-traps, pureron gas filters, SiC coated susceptors, and silicon boat for vertical furnace; and high precision matching and surface treatment products; as well as provides repair and overhaul services. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
